---
title: "Catharine Elgie, later Elgee"
---

## Catharine Elgie, later Elgee

**Dates:** (1837/8-1909)

**Maiden name:** (Hammond)

### Description

wife of the Rev. W. F. Elgie

### Biography

She married first (1858) Captain William George Everard Webber and had at least three children, then (1869) the Rev. Walter Francis Elgie (1837-1881), and had six more.  She seems to have changed the spelling of the name to Elgee.

### Letters

- [To Catharine Elgie, March 15 [1898]](../letters/3373_To_Catharine_Elgie.html)
- Letter from May 7th 1892
- Letter from [1890s?]
- Letter from Jany 27th [?1883]
- Letter from March 12  [1881]
- Letter from [25 February 1881]
- Letter from [spring 1881]
- Letter from June 5th 1879
- Letter from July 6th [1876?]
- Letter from [1874?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from March 23d 1872
- Letter from [1870s?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
